## beehiiv segments members

List the full subscriber records for a segment

### Synopsis

List full subscriber records for a specific segment, including optional expansion data.

API path: /publications/{publicationId}/segments/{segmentId}/members

```
beehiiv segments members <segmentId> [flags]
```

### Examples

```
beehiiv segments members segment_123
beehiiv segments members segment_123 --query expand=stats,custom_fields
```

### Options

```
      --all                 Fetch every page and aggregate the results
  -h, --help                help for members
      --query stringArray   Add a repeatable query parameter in key=value form
```

      --timeout string          Override the request timeout, e.g. 45s
      --verbose                 Print request and response details to stderr
